series_metadata.series_description: Includes record that can be used to provide complete site specific expense documentation. These include without limitation, attendance records, TAS records documenting the number of site-specific technical hours spent on each project, contractor services invoices, analytical services invoices, payroll documents, equipment invoices (if purchased for an individual site), indirect costs calculation support documents and documents showing payment of program costs (such as rent, utilities, supplies.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: following submission of final Financial Status Report unless otherwise directed by USEPA
